CREATE TABLE points (id UInt32, lon Decimal64(6), lat Decimal64(6));
SELECT greatCircleDistance(lon, lat, -lon, -lat) AS distance FROM points;
SELECT id, greatCircleDistance(lon, lat, 0.0, 0.0) AS distance FROM points WHERE distance < 10000000;
SELECT p1.id, greatCircleDistance(p1.lon, p1.lat, p2.lon, p2.lat) AS distance FROM points AS p1 JOIN points AS p2 ON p1.id != p2.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM points WHERE greatCircleDistance(lon, lat, 0, 0) < 5000;
CREATE TABLE temp_points AS SELECT lon, lat FROM points;
SELECT greatCircleDistance((SELECT lon FROM temp_points LIMIT 1), (SELECT lat FROM temp_points LIMIT 1), 55.755831, 37.617673) AS distance;
SELECT SUM(greatCircleDistance(lon, lat, 0, 0)) AS total_distance FROM points;
WITH (SELECT lon, lat FROM points WHERE id = 1) AS p1, (SELECT lon, lat FROM points WHERE id = 2) AS p2 SELECT greatCircleDistance(p1.lon, p1.lat, p2.lon, p2.lat) AS distance;
